description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMMCI that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have multiple jobs running on different operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-2019) with various steps including checking out the repository, syncing submodules, getting CPU info, building and testing FBGEMM libraries in static and shared configurations, and testing the installation of fbgemm_gpu on different platforms (CUDA, ROCm).
